TokenIn is escrowed immediately."},"userOrders(address,uint256)":{"notice":"Per-user active order tracking"}},"notice":"On-chain limit order book for GoodSwap. Agents place buy/sell orders         at a target price. Keepers fill orders when AMM price reaches target. Architecture:   - Orders are stored on-chain with escrowed tokenIn   - Keepers call fillOrder() when AMM price \u2265 target (sells) or \u2264 target (buys)   - Fill executes via GoodSwapRouter, output goes to order owner   - UBI fee is embedded in the AMM swap (no extra fee here)   - Orders can have expiry timestamps   - Partial fills are supported Fee: 0.05% keeper incentive on fill (paid from output tokens) Security: follows Checks-Effects-Interactions and guards fillOrder with a reentrancy lock to prevent a malicious router from re-entering and replaying fills.","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"src/swap/LimitOrderBook.sol":"LimitOrderBook"},"evmVersion":"prague","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":true,"runs":200},"remappings":[":forge-std/=lib/forge-std/src/"],"viaIR":true},"sources":{"lib/forge-std/src/interfaces/IERC20.sol":{"keccak256":"0x5945813ecc305238ca86d7a211a52f300e41173e34d39166f99758a857717dec","license":"MIT OR Apache-2.0","urls":["bzz-raw://2ace7b2e42fa6f84f660987cc3020d1494ba0fe4d558b4a64ab875d15a177f17","dweb:/ipfs/QmYR74diY5XWmkmmzCnboAYzeU9HtPun6qXVTUF51AspxN"]},"src/swap/LimitOrderBook.sol":{"keccak256":"0x5beb7992df3f6fbe8c22d715970b2e69067cdf734683e0789e715ccbae68f727","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://e69250acd7ec2a7fb33458df4ae3a0296d72aa1b0b08466b5cd5acec1a6f63df","dweb:/ipfs/QmPJB5jRwd3dXkEQppWNFwAJwy5oRveR1938LNiJMFUyP4"]}},"version":1}

params.fillAmounts: Array of fill amounts (same length as orderIds)
params.orderIds: Array of order IDs to fill

fillOrder(uint256,uint256).details: The keeper earns 0.05% of the output tokens as incentive.      Price check: actual output / fillAmount must meet targetPrice.      nonReentrant guard + CEI ordering: state is updated before any external call      to prevent a malicious router from re-entering and replaying the fill.

params.fillAmount: Amount of tokenIn to fill (for partial fills)

params.expiry: Unix timestamp when order expires (0 = never)
params.targetPrice: Minimum output per unit input (1e18 scaled).                    E.g., 2000e18 means "I want at least 2000 tokenOut per tokenIn"

MAX_ORDERS_PER_USER().notice: Maximum orders per user (prevent gas griefing)

batchFill(uint256[],uint256[]).notice: Batch fill multiple orders in one tx (gas efficient for keepers).

cancelOrder(uint256).notice: Cancel an active order. Refunds escrowed tokens.

fillOrder(uint256,uint256).notice: Fill a limit order via GoodSwapRouter. Anyone can call (keeper).

getActiveOrders(address).notice: Get active orders for a user.

getOrder(uint256).notice: Get full order details (packed struct fields).

getUserOrders(address).notice: Get all order IDs for a user.

isFillable(uint256).notice: Check if an order is fillable at current AMM price.

placeOrder(address,address,uint256,uint2.notice: Place a limit order. TokenIn is escrowed immediately.
